selection_rule: Only 002_evidence_grounded is selectable. It must pass every hard gate, beat 001a_deterministic_paraphrase on the paired learning-value composite, and show no hard-gate regression. Usefulness cannot compensate for unfaithful explanation.
claim_limits: Development inputs are human-validated Connections, not model-discovered Connections.
Passing development gates does not establish independent generalization.
Passing Oracle-conditioned explanation gates does not unblock Connection Discovery.
No personalization or Learner State claim is evaluated.
RELATED_TO is excluded because the source benchmark has no reliable positive support.
